warnings.message: The true-Citra anchor uses declared J2000 Spica coordinates.
Rahu and Ketu use the mean-node policy.
No predictive or remedial interpretation is produced.
KP output is a stellar identity layer, not a complete KP chart.

forbidden_conclusions: Rules from an unselected lineage were silently applied.
The bounded KP stellar layer is described as a complete KP chart.

reviewers.notes: Deterministic engineering fixture; independent Jyotisha domain sign-off remains pending.

title: Seven versus eight Jaimini karakas
